mapper.sql: select id, property_id, property_address, applicant_id, applicant_name, applicant_phone, repair_item, repair_description, image_url, submit_time, status, assignee_name, assignee_phone, assign_time, completed_time, score, comment, rate_time, rate_by, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from sys_property_repair
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM sys_property_repair WHERE 1 = 1 AND property_id = #{propertyId} AND applicant_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{applicantName}, '%') AND status = #{status} AND repair_item LIKE CONCAT('%', #{repairItem}, '%') ORDER BY submit_time DESC
SELECT * FROM sys_property_repair WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY submit_time DESC
mapper.update: update sys_property_repair set score = #{score}, comment = #{comment}, rate_time = sysdate(), rate_by = #{updateBy}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where id = #{id}
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM sys_property_repair WHERE id IN
#{id}
